title: DEX Pool Spot Price
description: Fetch real-time spot prices and liquidity for any AMM pool — Uniswap, Aerodrome, PancakeSwap, and more.
useCase: Build a DEX pool price monitor that shows real-time token0/token1 spot prices and total liquidity for any AMM pool — Uniswap, Aerodrome, PancakeSwap, and more.

keyParams.chainName: Foundational chain only: eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet
keyParams.contractAddress: AMM pool contract address (e.g. Uniswap v3 pool)
